summary: The diff correctly implements all requirements from REQ-19. The GasRefillPanel.tsx has been updated to show 'Cooking Gas Changed On' with 'Previously on:' (24th Dec 2025, 26th Jan 2026) and 'Latest on:' (2nd Mar 2026), and 'Refill Delivered On Below Dates:' with 'Previously on:' (8th Dec 2025, 21st Jan 2026) and 'Latest on:' (3rd Feb 2026). Card styling uses consistent Card/CardContent/CardHeader components matching the panel's existing style. No other panels or components were modified beyond GasRefillPanel.tsx and supporting metadata files.
